name: Icemirror
description: SS13 combat Pact Spirit for Terra builds. '+24% Terra Damage' node mapped to increasedDamage; the major node 'Stage in the Mirror' adds stacking Terra damage (moreDamage). Its Terra Skill Area (AoE size) node isn't a damage stat, so it's omitted.

name: Lady Obituary
description: SS13 drop-focused Pact Spirit (Afterlight Wraith drop quantity / Elegy Effect). No combat modifiers — included for completeness.
